disease_info.description: Fungal infections are caused by dermatophytes, yeasts, or molds that infect the outer skin layers. They commonly appear as ring-shaped, scaly, itchy patches and thrive in warm, moist environments.
disease_info.common_symptoms: Itching, ring-shaped rash, redness, scaling, cracking skin
disease_info.recommended_action: Keep the area clean and dry, use antifungal creams or powders, consult a dermatologist if symptoms worsen.
disease_info.image_indicators: Circular scaly edges, central clearing, reddish borders, flaky patches
